goal: Accept all worker outputs, verify the integration order is correct, and declare the example app ready for review.
inputs: task-04-qa-smoke — Done signal from team/qa + clean smoke matrix
constraints: Do not merge if any task is in Blocked state
Do not merge if npm run build exits non-zero
Do not merge if smoke matrix has any FAIL rows without a documented waiver
Do not merge if team/sdk and team/ui are both listed as last-writer on any single file
Track 1 (Capacitor mobile shell) is a separate PR — do not include its changes here
done_criteria: All four worker tasks are in Done state in the task registry
npm run build passes with 0 errors and 0 warnings
Zero MOCK_ constants in app/ or components/ (grep check)
Zero raw fetch() calls in pages (grep check)
Smoke matrix is fully green or has explicit waivers
No file owned by frozen shell list was modified
No Track 1 files are included in the diff
escalation_rules: Escalate to human reviewer if any task is still Blocked after 2 coordinator ticks
Escalate if the grep checks find MOCK_ or inline fetch in unexpected locations
Escalate if Track 1 and Track 2 files have overlapping changes

output_contract.format: Ready-to-review branch with passing build and clean smoke
